title: retzia roelloides
intro: Retzia roelloides, also known as Retzia roelloides, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds such as limonene and linalool. The health benefits of Retzia roelloides include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Retzia roelloides include essential oil, extracts, and teas, which can be used topically or taken internally, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
